what: Probe β piece 3b — CP-SAT strong-solver record-beating push on larger non-tight cells (25s/cell)
solver: ortools CP-SAT, 8 workers (installed operator-local; not a project/CI dep)
verdict: RED — 0 records beaten. CP-SAT MATCHED best_known on all 6 cells (C(n,w) 1001-1716) and PROVED 2 more exact; the other 4 matched-but-unproved in 25s. Confirms the RED is NOT a weak-solver artifact.
reading: Even a strong multi-worker solver reaches but does not exceed Brouwer's lower bounds on the tractable band; beating would need research-grade compute/constructions, not an autonomous laptop run.
